# Kernal Automation - SI Dept. (Full Product Guide)

> Professional PLC training kits and control cabinets for schools, labs, and enterprise training centers.

## About

Kernal Automation Co., Ltd. - System Integration Department sells pre-wired, ready-to-use PLC training kits with complete documentation, wiring diagrams, and training videos. We ship to 15+ countries via DHL/FedEx (5-7 days express). All kits include a 1-year warranty.

- Company: Kernal Automation Co., Ltd.
- Location: Dongguan, Guangdong, China
- Contact: Peggy Chan - peggy@kernal-automation.com | WhatsApp: +86 176 1205 1841
- Website: https://plc-training-kits.tech
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/kernal-automation-co-limited/
- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@PeggyinKernal

## Categories

### Siemens S7-1200 Training Kits
- Category URL: https://plc-training-kits.tech/products/siemens/
- Description: Complete range of Siemens S7-1200 PLC training kits for communication, PID control, motion control, pneumatic systems, and VFD integration.
- Overview: Professional training equipment for Siemens S7-1200 PLC platform. Complete kits for communication, PID control, motion control, pneumatic systems, and VFD integration.

### Mitsubishi FX5U Training Kits
- Category URL: https://plc-training-kits.tech/products/mitsubishi/
- Description: Complete range of Mitsubishi FX5U PLC training kits for motor control, communication, PID control, motion control, and pneumatic systems.
- Overview: Professional training equipment for Mitsubishi FX5U PLC platform. Complete kits for motor control, communication, PID control, motion control, and pneumatic systems.

### Allen-Bradley Training Kits
- Category URL: https://plc-training-kits.tech/products/allen-bradley/
- Description: Complete range of Allen-Bradley PLC training kits for Micro850 and MicroLogix platforms. PID control, VFD integration, communication, and pneumatic systems.
- Overview: Professional training equipment for Allen-Bradley Micro850 and MicroLogix platforms. Complete kits for PID control, VFD integration, communication, and pneumatic systems.

### Control Cabinets
- Category URL: https://plc-training-kits.tech/products/cabinets/
- Description: Compact control cabinets for motor control and process control training. DOL starters, star-delta starters, PID temperature control, and liquid level control.
- Overview: Compact control equipment for motor control and process control training. Smaller, lower-cost products for motor starter, liquid level, temperature, and environmental control practice.

## Products

### Siemens S7-1200 + V20 VFD Training Kit
- URL: https://plc-training-kits.tech/products/siemens-s7-1200-vfd-training-kit/
- Price: $1,152.77
- SKU: PLC-1212C-01
- Brand: Siemens
- Series: S7-1200
- Category: siemens
- Intro: Siemens S7-1200 PLC with V20 VFD for practical motor control and inverter training.
- Description: A complete Siemens training platform for learning PLC programming, motor control, inverter integration, and industrial wiring. Suitable for schools, labs, and enterprise training centers.
- Audience: Vocational schools, university automation labs, enterprise training centers, and self-learners preparing for Siemens PLC certification.
- Includes: Pre-wired hardware, user manual, wiring diagrams, training videos, and warranty/support as listed on the product page

### S7-1200 Communication Training Kit
- URL: https://plc-training-kits.tech/products/s7-1200-communication-training-kit/
- Price: From $1,631.30
- SKU: Communication-Siemens-02
- Brand: Siemens
- Series: S7-1200
- Category: siemens
- Intro: Dual-PLC communication training kit with Siemens S7-1200 and remote modules.
- Description: Designed for practical communication exercises between two S7-1200 PLCs and ET200SP remote modules. Includes HMI for monitoring. Useful for teaching industrial networking, signal exchange, and remote I/O integration.
- Audience: Intermediate to advanced students studying industrial networking, PROFINET, and remote I/O systems.
- Includes: Pre-wired hardware, user manual, wiring diagrams, training videos, and warranty/support as listed on the product page

### S7-1211C Temperature PID Kit
- URL: https://plc-training-kits.tech/products/s7-1211c-temperature-pid-kit/
- Price: $639.48
- SKU: PID-S7-1211C-T01
- Brand: Siemens
- Series: S7-1211C
- Category: siemens
- Intro: Temperature PID trainer for Siemens S7-1211C closed-loop control exercises.
- Description: Covers temperature sensing, analog signals, PID parameter tuning, and closed-loop control. Includes S7-1200 PLC, analog I/O modules, temperature sensors, actuators, and experimental platform.
- Audience: Students learning process control fundamentals, PID tuning, and analog signal handling.
- Includes: Pre-wired hardware, user manual, wiring diagrams, training videos, and warranty/support as listed on the product page

### PID Temperature Control Cabinet
- URL: https://plc-training-kits.tech/products/pid-temperature-control-cabinet/
- Price: From $33.33
- SKU: TPC-220-018
- Brand: Control Cabinet
- Series: Process Control
- Category: control-cabinets
- Intro: Automatic PID temperature control cabinet for practical training and maintenance exercises.
- Description: A compact control cabinet built for PID temperature control training, wiring practice, and maintenance-focused instruction. Available in single-phase (AC220V) and three-phase (AC380V) configurations with power ratings from 1.8kW to 40kW.
- Audience: Entry-level students learning temperature control and PID concepts.
- Includes: Pre-wired hardware, user manual, wiring diagrams, training videos, and warranty/support as listed on the product page

### Three-Phase Motor Training Set
- URL: https://plc-training-kits.tech/products/three-phase-motor-training-set/
- Price: $188.78
- SKU: MTR-FR-CON01
- Brand: Motor Control
- Series: Motor Control
- Category: control-cabinets
- Intro: Three-phase motor training set with forward and reverse rotation practice.
- Description: A complete three-phase motor control training set. Includes Y-series three-phase asynchronous motor, motor forward/reverse contactors, control relays, start/stop buttons, emergency stop switch, power protection device, forward/reverse changeover switch, operation status indicator lights and control circuit wiring.
- Audience: Students learning three-phase motor fundamentals, wiring, and rotation control.
- Includes: Pre-wired hardware, user manual, wiring diagrams, training videos, and warranty/support as listed on the product page

- SKU: TP-1
- Brand: Control Cabinet
- Series: Environmental Control
- Category: control-cabinets
- Intro: Environmental control box for intelligent temperature and humidity training.
- Description: Supports sensor and control education around temperature and humidity management. Available in single-phase TP series and three-phase SP series, from 3kW to 15kW.
- Audience: Students learning environmental monitoring and intelligent control systems.
- Includes: Pre-wired hardware, user manual, wiring diagrams, training videos, and warranty/support as listed on the product page

## Services

- PLC Programming: Siemens TIA Portal, Mitsubishi GX Works 3, AB CCW, HMI Design
- Automation Software: Licensed Siemens/Mitsubishi software sales
- Custom Kit Design: Curriculum-matched, component customization, bulk orders

## Ordering

- Contact: Peggy Chan - peggy@kernal-automation.com | WhatsApp: +86 176 1205 1841
- Shipping: DHL/FedEx 5-7 days | Air 7-14 days | Sea 30-45 days
- Payment: T/T, PayPal, Alipay
